title: hydrangea scandens subsp. chinensis
intro: Hydrangea scandens subsp. chinensis, also known as the Chinese climbing hydrangea, is a perennial vine in the family Hydrangiaceae that is native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Hydrangea scandens subsp. chinensis are believed to include lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health.
